ddls:
CREATE TABLE "brands" (
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each brand */,
  "brand_name" TEXT /* Name of the brand */,
  "brand_description" TEXT /* Description of the brand */,
  "brand_website" TEXT /* Website URL of the brand */,
  "brand_logo_url" TEXT /* URL of the brand's logo */,
  "brand_country" TEXT /* Country of origin for the brand */,
  "brand_founding_year" INTEGER /* Year the brand was founded */,
  "brand_social_media_urls" TEXT /* URLs for the brand's social media profiles */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_lines" (
  "product_line_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product line */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the brand offering the product line */,
  "product_line_name" TEXT /* Name of the product line */,
  "product_line_description" TEXT /* Description of the product line */,
  "target_gender" TEXT /* Gender the product line is designed for (e.g., Men, Women, Unisex) */,
  "target_age_group" TEXT /* Age group the product line targets (e.g., Kids, Adults) */,
  "product_line_image_url" TEXT /* URL of an image representing the product line */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_line_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_lines_brand_id FOREIGN KEY ("brand_id") REFERENCES brands ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size */,
  "size_name" TEXT /* Name of the size (e.g., S/M, L/XL) */,
  "waist_relaxed" TEXT /* Relaxed waist measurement */,
  "length_insea_from_crotch" TEXT /* Inseam length from crotch */,
  "front_rise" TEXT /* Front rise measurement */,
  "back_rise" TEXT /* Back rise measurement */,
  "leg_opening" TEXT /* Leg opening measurement */,
  "size_chart_url" TEXT /* URL of a detailed size chart for the specific size */,
  "size_description" TEXT /* Description of the size, including any special notes */,
  "size_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement (e.g., inches, centimeters) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_line_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product line the product belongs to */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "product_description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "product_image_url" TEXT /* URL of the product image */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the price is listed */,
  "product_type" TEXT /* Type of product (e.g., Pants, Shirts, Dresses) */,
  "product_material" TEXT /* Material(s) the product is made from */,
  "product_color" TEXT /* Color of the product */,
  "product_size_chart_url" TEXT /* URL of the size chart specific to the product */,
  "product_care_instructions" TEXT /* Care instructions for the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_product_line_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_line_id") REFERENCES product_lines ("product_line_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_sizes" (
  "product_size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product size */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size */,
  "stock_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product size in stock */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the stock quantity was last updated */,
  "size_chart_url" TEXT /* URL of the size chart specific to the product size */,
  "size_description" TEXT /* Description of the size, including any special notes */,
  "size_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement (e.g., inches, centimeters) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_sizes_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_sizes_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_measurements" (
  "customer_measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer measurement entry */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer */,
  "waist" TEXT /* Customer's waist measurement */,
  "insea_length" TEXT /* Customer's insea length from crotch */,
  "front_rise" TEXT /* Customer's front rise measurement */,
  "back_rise" TEXT /* Customer's back rise measurement */,
  "leg_opening" TEXT /* Customer's leg opening measurement */,
  "customer_height" TEXT /* Customer's height */,
  "customer_weight" TEXT /* Customer's weight */,
  "customer_bust" TEXT /* Customer's bust measurement */,
  "customer_hips" TEXT /* Customer's hips measurement */,
  "customer_shoulder_width" TEXT /* Customer's shoulder width measurement */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the measurement was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_measurements_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "customer_gender" TEXT /* Gender of the customer */,
  "customer_birthdate" TEXT /* Birthdate of the customer */,
  "customer_language" TEXT /* Preferred language of the customer */,
  "customer_currency" TEXT /* Preferred currency of the customer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the customer account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size recommendation */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product */,
  "recommended_size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the recommended size */,
  "fit_confidence" TEXT /* Confidence level of the size recommendation (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "recommendation_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the size recommendation (e.g., based on body measurements, based on previous purchases) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the recommendation was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_recommendations_recommended_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("recommended_size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_recommendations_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_recommendations_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fit_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fit feedback entry */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer */,
  "product_size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product size */,
  "fit_rating" INTEGER /* Rating of the fit (1-5) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments on the fit */,
  "fit_accuracy" TEXT /* Accuracy of the fit (e.g., perfect, slightly tight, slightly loose) */,
  "fit_adjustment" TEXT /* Any adjustments made by the customer to achieve the right fit */,
  "fit_images" TEXT /* URLs of images showing the fit */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the feedback was provided */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fit_feedback_product_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_size_id") REFERENCES product_sizes ("product_size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fit_feedback_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total amount of the order */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the total amount is listed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Address to which the order will be shipped */,
  "billing_address" TEXT /* Address for billing */,
  "order_notes" TEXT /* Any notes or special instructions provided by the customer */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment used (e.g., credit card, PayPal) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)
